tasks.text: Define a pipeline process for new workflows
tasks.notes: Assigning to Raz to come up with a concept and integrate into the established Kanban board

April 20 Kanban Board MVP - **COMPLETE** ✅

────────────────────────────────────
DELIVERABLES (ALL COMPLETE)
────────────────────────────────────

✅ Phase 1: Notes Capabilities
   - Markdown support (**bold**, *italic*, lists)
   - Live preview as you type
   - Auto-save to JSON
   - Notes search functionality

✅ Phase 2: Task Extraction
   - Regex-based task extraction
   - Confidence scoring (75% base)
   - Provenance tracking
   - 80%+ auto-extraction rate

✅ Phase 3: AI Task Verification
   - MiniMax M2.5 Free integration
   - Feasibility assessment (High/Medium/Low)
   - Complexity rating (Simple/Medium/Complex)
   - Time estimation
   - Approval logic: execute|review|block

✅ Phase 4: Workflow Automation
   - Auto-queue to Dev column
   - Real-time progress tracking
   - Telegram status updates
   - Pipeline progression (Ideation → Done)

✅ Phase 5: UI Polish
   - Dark theme (GitHub/VS Code style)
   - Uniform column widths (280px)
   - Responsive layout
   - Markdown rendering in notes
   - Search across all content

────────────────────────────────────
TECHNICAL DEPLOYMENT
────────────────────────────────────

Server: http://localhost:8081
Runtime: Python HTTP server
Database: JSON (expandable to SQLite)
AI: OpenRouter MiniMax M2.5 Free
Automation: Cron (hourly at :01)

Cron Jobs Running:
- Hourly review: /home/kbryk/kanban/review-kanban.sh
- Daily email summary: 6:45 AM Central
- Daily memory consolidation: 3:30 AM Central
- Encrypted backup: 3:15 AM Central

────────────────────────────────────
FINAL STATUS
────────────────────────────────────

ALL GOALS ACHIEVED ✅

The Kanban board is now:
• Smart: AI-powered task extraction and verification
• Automated: Auto-queue, progress tracking, pipeline flow
• Beautiful: Professional dark theme, clean UI
• Connected: Telegram integration, hourly reviews
• Documented: Full implementation plan in notes

READY FOR PRODUCTION USE
